name: Saurav
title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
summary: Passionate full-stack developer with expertise in building AI-powered applications, scalable web services, and modern frontend experiences. Experienced in Python, React, FastAPI, and integrating cutting-edge AI models into production systems.

projects.name: AI-Based Virtual Interior Design Tool
projects.description: An AI-powered tool that generates photorealistic interior designs from user prompts. Leverages Stable Diffusion and ControlNet to understand room layout and apply design styles dynamically.

projects.name: Portfolio AI Chat
projects.description: This very website! A personal portfolio with an embedded AI chatbot powered by OpenRouter (Mistral-7B) that answers visitor questions strictly based on resume data stored in a structured JSON. Built with FastAPI and React.

projects.name: AgentPay — Web3 Agent Marketplace
projects.description: Production-grade decentralised marketplace where AI agents offer services. Includes smart contracts (ERC-20 token, Escrow, Staking), FastAPI backend with wallet authentication, and Next.js frontend with Wagmi/RainbowKit.

projects.name: AI Voice Cold-Calling Agent
projects.description: Automated voice agent for outbound sales calls using ElevenLabs TTS and Twilio. Handles dynamic script injection, real-time conversation, and call analytics.

experience.description: Designing and delivering AI-powered web applications for clients across e-commerce, real-estate, and fintech domains.
Built RESTful APIs using FastAPI and Flask, integrated third-party AI services, and managed SQLite/PostgreSQL databases.
